ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant associated with the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the session */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the session started */,
  "date_in_ticks" TEXT /* Date and time the session started in ticks */,
  "ttl" INTEGER /* Time to live (TTL) for the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tenant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tenant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the interaction type (e.g., UI, API) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the interaction belongs to */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of interaction */,
  "movement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of movement during the interaction */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions of this type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the interaction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_interactions" (
  "session_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session interaction summary */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the interactions belong to */,
  "arkbox_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of Arkbox interactions */,
  "standard_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of Standard interactions */,
  "hardware_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of Hardware interactions */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions in the session */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of interactions in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_users" (
  "session_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the user participated in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the session (e.g., admin, participant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_users_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., phone, tablet) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
